preview.title: A TV advertisement for a US fiber internet provider

blocks.title: Allo Fiber TV Campaign
blocks.text:
Allo Fiber launched a TV campaign to promote its initiative supporting schools, donating $50 for every new customer who signed up.
The team created a warm, vibrant video using hand-drawn illustrations and playful animation to tell the story and inspire participation. The campaign reinforced Allo Fiber’s commitment to local communities.
My role was to shape the video flow, animate selected scenes, and create the full illustration style.
